creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
files/patch_unoconv is not in a unified diff format -- see how there are multiple "<<<<< HEAD", "======" and ">>>>> " lines in there. If the upstream commit applies cleanly on 0.8.2, I suggest just downloading the commit from GitHub in a diff format (https://github.com/unoconv/unoconv/commit/acfac594e643f9c44f1c3b8d6d8957190a4d76f2.diff) and removing the "a/" and "b/" from the paths. The VuXML entry needs to be adjusted too: - The entry usually begins with "$packagename --" (so "unoconv -- SSRF and local file inclusion"). - The

entry inside the

has a leading "escription" that shouldn't be there. - You should add and entries to
